text: Planning a trip is always exciting, whether it’s a weekend getaway or a longer adventure. When I visited Japan last year, I spent weeks researching destinations, booking flights, and learning basic phrases. Once there, I immersed myself in new cultures, from visiting ancient temples to observing local customs. The food was a highlight – I tried sushi fresh from the market, savory ramen, and sweet mochi that melted in my mouth. Language barriers sometimes made ordering tricky, but smiling and pointing worked well. These travel experiences created lasting memories. Even now, I recall the kindness of strangers and the vibrant energy of crowded streets. Exploring the world truly opens your mind.
